name: Potato Pot Pie
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces Vegetables, mixed, frozen, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook mushrooms and onions in 2 tablespoons dressing over medium-high heat.
2. Add flour and seasonings; gradually add milk, stirring until thickened.
3. Stir in 1 cup dressing, turkey, vegetables, and 1 cup cheese; cook for 5 minutes.
4. Spoon mixture into a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
5. Stir 1/2 cup dressing into potatoes.
6. Top casserole with potato mixture; broil until golden.
7. Sprinkle with remaining cheese; continue broiling until cheese begins to melt.
